title: BetaCreate
description: A Minecraft Modpack that's focused on the world generation, gameplay, and visuals of Minecraft Beta, but integrates the Create Mod + other gameplay improvements!
body:
A Minecraft Modpack that's focused on the world generation, gameplay, and visuals of Minecraft Beta, but integrates the Create Mod + other gameplay improvements and additions!

Notable World Generation Changes:
- Beta 1.7.3 Styled Surface, including Beta biomes only
- No Andesite, Granite, Diorite, Tuff, and Deepslate annoying you in the mines! 🗣️
- No Cave Biomes, but still the same new World Height!
- Lots of new Structures to explore!
- Beta Nether with no biomes!

Content Mods:
- The Create Mod
- Nostalgic Tweaks
- Many YUNG's Structure Mods
- Tom's Simple Storage
- Applied Energistics
- Farmer's Delight
- Handcrafted Furniture
- Mutant Monsters
- Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
- The Aether
- A new Enderdragon fight!
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
